name: dreampia-dev-kit
description: Documentation operations and verification skills for AI coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Documentation operations for AI coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Dreampia Dev Kit provides reusable PRD, TRD, IA, user-flow, API spec, ERD, QA checklist, and doc-audit skills plus validation and operation guidance for agentic development.
defaultPrompt: Draft a PRD for this feature.
Create API and ERD docs from this PRD.
